name: luo-music
description: LUO Music Player - A beautiful music player for Netease Cloud Music and QQ Music
author: sansenjian

scripts.dev:server: npm run guard:configs && concurrently "npm run server" "node scripts/run-with-env.cjs APP_RUNTIME=web -- vite --mode web"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run rebuild:native && npm run guard:configs && concurrently -k "node scripts/run-with-env.cjs APP_RUNTIME=electron -- vite" "node scripts/dev/dev-electron-launcher.cjs"
scripts.dev:electron:debug: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs ELECTRON_INSPECTOR=9223 -- npm run dev:electron
scripts.build: npm run rebuild:native && npm run guard:configs && electron-vite build --config electron.vite.config.ts
scripts.build:web: node scripts/build/clean-targets.cjs dist build/service && npm run guard:configs && npm run build:server && node scripts/run-with-env.cjs APP_RUNTIME=web -- vite build --mode web
scripts.build:electron:bundle: npm run rebuild:native && npm run guard:configs && npm run build:qq-runtime && concurrently --success all "npm run build:server" "electron-vite build --config electron.vite.config.ts"
scripts.build:electron: node scripts/build/clean-targets.cjs --force build "out/LUO Music-win32-x64" out/make && npm run build:electron:bundle && electron-forge make
scripts.build:electron:portable: node scripts/build/clean-targets.cjs --force build out/portable && npm run build:electron:bundle && electron-builder --config electron-builder.portable.json --publish never && node scripts/build/finalize-portable-output.cjs out/portable
scripts.preview: npm run guard:configs && node scripts/run-with-env.cjs APP_RUNTIME=web -- vite preview
scripts.package: node scripts/build/clean-targets.cjs --force build "out/LUO Music-win32-x64" && npm run build:electron:bundle && electron-forge package
scripts.make: node scripts/build/clean-targets.cjs --force build "out/LUO Music-win32-x64" out/make && npm run build:electron:bundle && electron-forge make
scripts.make:fast: node scripts/build/clean-targets.cjs --force build "out/LUO Music-win32-x64" out/make && npm run build:electron:bundle && node scripts/run-with-env.cjs LUO_FAST_MAKE=1 -- electron-forge make
scripts.analyze:web: npm run guard:configs && node scripts/run-with-env.cjs APP_RUNTIME=web -- vite-bundle-visualizer -c config/vite.analyze.web.js -m production -o .vite_cache/reports/web-bundle.html --open false
scripts.analyze:electron-renderer: npm run guard:configs && vite-bundle-visualizer -c config/vite.analyze.electron-renderer.js -m production -o .vite_cache/reports/electron-renderer-bundle.html --open false
